name: Hughes Finance
description_short: Hughes Finance offers installment loans up to $1,300 in Houston with same-day funding and flexible terms up to 12 months, positioning themselves as a cheaper alternative to payday lenders.
description_long: Hughes Finance is an online lender based in Houston, Texas, operating at 2200 North Loop West, Suite #114. The company claims to be regulated by the Consumer Credit Commission and markets itself as one of the first Houston lenders to offer an online finance program. They serve consumers across the credit spectrum, explicitly welcoming applicants with less-than-perfect credit alongside those with good credit. The company's business model centers on providing quick access to cash for immediate financial needs. Hughes Finance offers personal loans, cash loans, and signature loans ranging up to $1,300 with repayment periods up to 12 months. All loans are structured as installment loans rather than payday loans. Their primary differentiator is positioning themselves as significantly cheaper than payday loan alternatives—claiming to be "10 times cheaper than Payday Advance Companies." They emphasize that interest rates do not vary based on credit score, meaning all borrowers pay the same rate regardless of creditworthiness. The application process is entirely online and mobile-friendly, with approval decisions and same-day funding promised. The company operates Monday–Friday 9am–5pm and by appointment on Saturdays. While Hughes Finance markets aggressively against payday lenders and emphasizes affordability, they provide no specific APR, fee structure, or concrete loan terms on their website. The absence of transparent pricing information is a significant limitation for consumers trying to evaluate actual costs. Their maximum loan amount of $1,300 and 12-month repayment term position them squarely in the emergency cash and small personal loan space rather than broader personal lending.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day funding available after online application approval
Loans structured as 12-month installment loans rather than short-term payday loans
No collateral required for signature loans
Explicitly welcomes applicants with poor or fair credit
Completely online and mobile application process
Interest rate is uniform across all credit profiles (no rate variation)
Claims to be 10x cheaper than payday loan companies
cons: No APR, fees, or interest rates disclosed on website—impossible to verify cost claims
Maximum loan amount of $1,300 is quite limited
Regulatory status claims not independently verifiable (self-describes as Consumer Credit Commission regulated)
No customer reviews, ratings, or third-party validation visible
Physical office limited to Houston, TX only
best_for: Houston-area residents needing quick cash ($500–$1,300) for emergencies
Borrowers with poor or fair credit seeking alternatives to payday loans
Consumers seeking same-day or next-day funding for unexpected expenses
diagnosis: Hughes Finance is best for Houston residents facing immediate cash needs under $1,300 who have poor credit and want to avoid payday loans. The critical caveat is the complete lack of transparent pricing—no APR, fees, or terms are published, making it impossible to verify whether their claims of being cheaper than payday lenders are accurate. Consumers should request full pricing details before applying.
services: Personal loans up to $1,300 with up to 12-month repayment
Online application and approval within 24 hours
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2200 N Loop W Ste. 114, Houston, TX 77018
